tasks.title: EmailLink entity and EmailLinkMapper
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN openregister_email_links table exists WHEN an EmailLink entity is created THEN it persists with all required fields
GIVEN EmailLinkMapper WHEN findByAccountAndMessage is called THEN it returns matching email links

tasks.title: EmailService with reverse-lookup methods
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN email links exist WHEN findByMessageId is called THEN objects are returned with resolved metadata
GIVEN emails from a sender WHEN findObjectsBySender is called THEN distinct objects with email counts are returned
GIVEN valid params WHEN quickLink is called THEN a new email link is created

tasks.title: EmailsController endpoints
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a valid accountId/messageId WHEN GET /api/emails/by-message/{accountId}/{messageId} THEN linked objects are returned
GIVEN a valid sender WHEN GET /api/emails/by-sender?sender=x THEN discovered objects are returned
GIVEN valid body WHEN POST /api/emails/quick-link THEN link is created and 201 returned

tasks.title: Routes and input validation
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN routes.php WHEN email routes are added THEN by-message, by-sender, quick-link are accessible
GIVEN invalid input WHEN endpoints are called THEN 400 errors with messages are returned

tasks.title: MailAppScriptListener and Application registration
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Mail app is enabled WHEN BeforeTemplateRenderedEvent fires THEN sidebar script is injected
GIVEN Mail app is not installed WHEN any page loads THEN no script is registered
GIVEN user without OpenRegister access WHEN Mail app opens THEN script is not injected

tasks.title: Webpack mail-sidebar entry point
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN webpack config has mail-sidebar entry WHEN npm run build runs THEN openregister-mail-sidebar.js is produced
GIVEN the bundle THEN it uses externalized Vue and @nextcloud/axios

tasks.title: Vue sidebar components
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN sidebar loads WHEN linked objects exist THEN LinkedObjectsList shows object cards
GIVEN sidebar loads WHEN sender has other cases THEN SuggestedObjectsList shows discovery results
GIVEN user clicks Link to Object WHEN dialog opens THEN search and link flow works

tasks.title: Composables and API layer
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Mail app URL changes WHEN observer detects it THEN accountId/messageId are extracted
GIVEN 300ms debounce WHEN rapid navigation occurs THEN only last change triggers refresh
GIVEN API calls WHEN responses arrive THEN results are cached per messageId

tasks.title: CSS, i18n, accessibility
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN sidebar renders THEN NL Design System CSS variables are used
GIVEN Dutch user WHEN sidebar loads THEN all text is in Dutch
GIVEN keyboard navigation WHEN Tab is pressed THEN all interactive elements are reachable

tasks.title: Unit tests
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN EmailService WHEN tested THEN 3+ unit tests pass
GIVEN EmailsController WHEN tested THEN 3+ unit tests pass
GIVEN MailAppScriptListener WHEN tested THEN 2+ unit tests pass
